---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

What feature would you like to see?

## Use Case

What problem does this solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Example API

How would you expect to use this feature?

```typescript
import { render } from 'pretext-pdf'

const pdf = await render({
  content: [
    {
      type: 'your-new-element',
      // ...
    }
  ]
})
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternatives you've considered or workarounds you're currently using?

## Additional Context

Links to relevant specs, examples, or prior art.
